description: Catalog of legal document templates sourced from Common Paper's public GitHub repositories. Each template is a standardized, openly licensed legal agreement that the Prelegal system can later modify for the user.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
templates.description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA, allowing two parties to share confidential information with each other while keeping it protected.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
templates.description: Fillable cover page for the Mutual NDA, capturing the parties, effective date, and deal-specific variables that accompany the standard terms.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Standard agreement for selling or purchasing access to a cloud-based software (SaaS) product, covering subscriptions, data, warranties, and liability.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Agreement between a company and an early design partner to collaborate on developing and giving feedback on a new product or feature.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments, support response times, and service credits for a cloud or software service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Agreement governing the provision of professional services, including statements of work, deliverables, fees, and ownership of work product.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Data Processing Agreement addressing how personal data is processed under privacy laws such as GDPR and CCPA, including roles, security, and sub-processors.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software, covering license scope, restrictions, support, warranties, and liability.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Agreement establishing a business partnership between two companies to collaborate, refer, or resell, including roles, responsibilities, and revenue terms.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for running a time-limited pilot or proof-of-concept of a product or service before a full commercial commitment.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: HIPAA Business Associate Agreement governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) between a covered entity and a business associate.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Addendum that adds AI-specific terms to an existing agreement, covering use of AI systems, training data, model outputs, and related responsibilities.
